name: Blackwood Credit Services
description_short: Michigan-based credit restoration company that disputes errors on credit reports and offers business consulting. One-time $299 fee plus $50/month after disputes complete.
description_long:
Blackwood Credit Services is a Michigan-based credit restoration and business consulting firm founded by an experienced credit restoration specialist. The company positions itself around the tagline "We do the work, you get all the credit™" and claims to have helped 6,209+ clients improve their financial standing.

The company's primary service is credit restoration through dispute processes targeting errors and negative items on credit reports. They also offer business-related services including general business consulting for existing businesses, and small business startup preparation (document preparation, startup checklists, business structure development, and federal tax identification number assistance).

Blackwood distinguishes itself through its transparent pricing model and upfront commitment requirements. They charge a one-time $299 consulting/credit report audit fee and first work discovery fee, followed by $50 monthly maintenance fees beginning 30+ days after disputes are completed—not in advance. The company provides clients with a dispute timeline showing expected 3-6 month enrollment periods. They require clients to pull 3-bureau credit reports before enrollment (from annualcreditreport.com, not Credit Karma) and mandate a commitment to complete assigned homework.

However, the company has significant limitations. They do not service Georgia residents. The website lacks detail on dispute success rates, turnaround specifics, or detailed service methodologies. There is no information about credentials, certifications, or regulatory compliance disclosures. The $299 initial fee combined with ongoing $50 monthly charges places this at the higher end of credit repair pricing, with no guarantees stated.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Transparent pricing: $299 one-time fee plus $50/month (after disputes complete, not in advance)
No advance payment for credit repair work—monthly fees only begin 30+ days after disputes finish
Provides clear dispute timeline expectations (3-6 month typical program duration)
Requires clients to obtain actual 3-bureau credit reports (not free estimates), ensuring accurate baseline data
Founder has stated experience in credit restoration and financial goal preparation
Offers bundled business consulting and startup services beyond credit repair
Clear enrollment requirements upfront reduce client mismatches
cons: Does not service Georgia residents, limiting geographic availability
Website contains no dispute success rates, case studies, or specific outcome guarantees
No credentials, certifications, regulatory licenses, or compliance disclosures mentioned
Higher initial fee ($299) compared to some competitors; total cost can reach $600+ over 6-month program
Limited detail on dispute methodology, credit bureau communication strategy, or what specific homework entails
best_for: Michigan residents with credit report errors or negative items seeking hands-on dispute assistance
Entrepreneurs and small business owners needing both credit repair and business startup/consulting support
Individuals willing to pay for personalized service and able to commit to 3-6 month programs with ongoing participation
diagnosis: Blackwood Credit Services is best for Michigan residents and small business owners who want personalized credit dispute handling and can afford $299 upfront plus $50/month fees. The main caveat is the lack of published success rates, regulatory disclosures, and limited geographic availability outside Michigan—combined with higher pricing than some competitors, requiring strong confidence in the founder's stated expertise.
services: Credit report error identification and dispute processing
Credit goal preparation and financial counseling
General business consulting for existing businesses
Client portal access for program management
Monthly follow-up service and account management
Custom homework and action plan assignment
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 25959 Kelly Rd Ste D, Roseville, MI 48066
meta_description: Michigan-based credit restoration company that disputes errors on credit reports and offers business consulting.
